recommendations.title: Force Majeure
recommendations.overview: While holidaying in the French Alps, a Swedish family deals with acts of cowardliness as an avalanche breaks out.

recommendations.title: Involuntary
recommendations.overview: In several unrelated stories, the consequences of putting one's foot down – or failing to do so – are explored.

recommendations.title: The Square
recommendations.overview: A prestigious Stockholm museum's chief art curator finds himself in times of both professional and personal crisis as he attempts to set up a controversial new exhibit.

recommendations.title: Triangle of Sadness
recommendations.overview: A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the uber-rich, helmed by an unhinged, alcoholic captain. What first appears Instagrammable ends catastrophically, leaving the survivors stranded on a desert island in a struggle of hierarchy

recommendations.title: The Heist of the Century
recommendations.overview: In 2006, a group of thieves performed what is considered one of the most famous and smart bank heists in the history of Argentina. How they robbed the Rio bank is as surprising as what happened afterwards. This is their story.

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: The Hunters
recommendations.overview: A policeman from Stockholm come to Norrbotten in Sweden, to join his brother, now when their father is dead. While there he starts to work on a long-running case where reindeers have been poached and soon discovers that his brother is involved...

recommendations.title: Brother
recommendations.overview: A Japanese Yakuza gangster's deadly existence in his homeland gets him exiled to Los Angeles, where he is taken in by his little brother and his brother's gang.  Original Title: ブラザー

recommendations.title: Marathon Man
recommendations.overview: A graduate student and obsessive runner in New York is drawn into a mysterious plot involving his brother, a member of the secretive Division.

recommendations.title: The Golden Dream
recommendations.overview: A group of Central-American teen-agers depart from the slums of Guatemala City escaping poverty and violence, towards the promised land of California.
